violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Raw animal foods (such as tuna and swordfish) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as feta cheese) in the 1-door reach-in cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The retail display case was observed held at an ambient temperature of 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within unit were evaluated and disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Shell eggs were observed held at room temperature (75 degrees Fahrenheit). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were evaluated and disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Walk-In cooler was observed held at an ambient temperature of 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were evaluated and voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Establishment is not to store TCS food items within unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less is maintained. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Establishment was observed bottling juice within the establishment without prior approval from RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Establishment is to cease practice of bottling juice until a HACCP plan is submitted and approved by the regulatory authority. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Tuna steaks and swordfish kabob chunks were observed thawed with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged within ROP shall be removed from their original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food items. Food items were observed held at temperatures ranging from 41-42 degrees Fahrenheit and were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Proper thawing methods were reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The walk-in cooler and deli display cooler located in the establishment were observed unable to hold at an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit and were not in good repair. Establishment is to call service for units. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The condensate from the walk-in cooler and air conditioning unit are draining into handsinks. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

A section of the wall in the kitchen are constructed of material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

A cot was observed in the kitchen preparation space. A private home, a room used as living or sleeping quarters, or an area directly opening into a room used as living or sleeping quarters may not be used for conducting food establishment operations. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The condensate from the walk-in cooler and air conditioning unit are draining into handsinks. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

A section of the wall in the kitchen are constructed of material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
